answer: The movement speed of a Giant Eagle is 80 ft. fly. Therefore, a Giant Eagle can fly at a speed of 80 feet.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer correctly states the flying speed of a Giant Eagle but omits the walking speed of 10 feet, which is part of the complete movement speed information.
